commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh I cried unto you, O LORD: I said, you are my refuge and my portion in the land of the living. Augustine of Hippo 6. "Unto thee have I cried, O Lord: I have said, Thou art my hope" (ver. When I endured, when I was in tribulation, "I said, Thou art my hope. " My hope here, therefore I endure. But "my portion," not here, but "in the land of the living. " God giveth a portion in the land of the living; but not something from Himself without Himself. What will He give to one that loveth Him, save Himself.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Living. On the earth, (Berthier) or land of Judea, (St. Chrysostom) in this life, (Calmet) or in the next. In all, God is our only protector, and reward, Psalm xv. 5. (Berthier)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
